report_name: CrowdStrike's 'Project QuiltWorks' Unites Industry to Tackle AI-Driven Vulnerability Surge

identities.name: CrowdStrike
identities.description: A cybersecurity company that launched Project QuiltWorks, an industry coalition to address AI-discovered vulnerabilities, and a related 'Frontier AI Readiness and Resilience Service'.

identities.name: Project QuiltWorks
identities.description: An industry-wide coalition launched by CrowdStrike, bringing together AI developers and cybersecurity firms to create a structured approach for managing the surge of vulnerabilities identified by frontier AI models.

identities.name: OpenAI
identities.description: An AI development company and a key partner in Project QuiltWorks, whose frontier AI models' capabilities for vulnerability discovery prompted the initiative.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: An AI development company and a key partner in Project QuiltWorks. Its models, such as Mythos, are noted for their ability to discover software vulnerabilities.

identities.name: Accenture
identities.description: A global systems integrator and a partner in the Project QuiltWorks coalition.

identities.name: EY
identities.description: A global systems integrator and a partner in the Project QuiltWorks coalition.

identities.name: IBM Cybersecurity Services
identities.description: The cybersecurity division of IBM, serving as a global systems integrator and partner in the Project QuiltWorks coalition.

identities.name: Kroll
identities.description: A founding member and partner in the Project QuiltWorks coalition.
